probe_method: Send long-generation request (2000-word essay) with 3-second client-side timeout. Verify client times out cleanly. Check /api/ps afterward for zombie inference. Verify new requests still work.

probes.client_behavior: Clean timeout, exception raised at 3.0s exactly

probes.note: Qwen was unloaded from VRAM after client disconnect. Ollama appears to abort server-side inference when client connection drops.
New request succeeds. Server is healthy. Response empty due to Qwen thinking-mode with low num_predict.

evidence_summary: Client-side timeout triggers cleanly (exactly at specified 3s). No zombie inference — Ollama aborts server-side processing when client disconnects and unloads the model. Server remains healthy for new requests. Behavior is better than required: not only no zombie, but active cleanup.
server_side_cleanup: Ollama unloads model from VRAM on client disconnect. This is aggressive but prevents resource leaks.
